name: The Sentinel
description:
DAY 1, MOTHERFUCKERS! DAY 1!!! (… insert Travis Scott’s voice) [can’t forget the booty pic⬇️]

How we feel about the Scooge’s Week event? Yurr, might be another successful event of this era. Y’know, making this event was hard, especially when trying to think of any personality for each Scooge’s OCs. But aye, I try my best, tho.

For those who were curious about whose that last bonus character is… yo, alexthehatlover, tell everyone who’s the bonus character is, based on the hint I gave out last week. I know you know who it was, so lemme repeat that hint: He featured Kanye, and the cover of the single is disturbing.

This is lowkey just the Blood Warden, but if Scooge decided to make it as his own custom Warden, by lowkey just giving it a different name. So instead of being a creepy version with glowing white eyes, its lowkey just the goonslop version of it, which is very beneficial for a person to be tricked. Trying to crack the Sentinel, just to lowkenuinely get swung by its long ass claws. This require elite ball knowledge.

Just… here’s some information about the Sentinel:

OC OWNED BY EPHEMERALSCOOGE
creator: GRIMKid 0
